comment: Very clear explanation of ETL process with real HDB data
Great examples but I wish there were more window function exercises
The correlation heatmap for housing prices was really insightful
Plotly charts are interactive and beautiful
Good intro to supervised learning with Singapore housing data
Would be nice to have more text data examples from Singapore context
Understanding data pipelines through transport data was brilliant
Good conceptual overview of batch vs streaming architecture
Practical scraping examples with proper ethics discussion
ARIMA forecasting for HDB prices was very educational
Had some trouble with CSV upload at first but figured it out
Best SQL tutorial I found that uses real Singapore data
Random Forest feature importance plot was very helpful
K-means clustering of neighborhoods made total sense
Would appreciate more depth on deep learning architectures
Image preprocessing pipeline was well explained
Simulated MRT crowding events were a creative teaching approach
Star schema design for HDB transactions was crystal clear
Good coverage of Flask API deployment patterns
Could use more practice problems on Bayesian statistics
